perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown hair wearing a white t-shirt and striped pants stands in a modern kitchen/living room, holding a purple mop handle and a white mop head, speaking enthusiastically. (2) Close-up shots show three different types of mop head refills (Supamop) in their respective red, black, and blue packaging on a wooden table. (3) The man demonstrates the 'Fine Fabric' mop head on a polished wooden floor, then a close-up shows the 'Oil-Resistant' head cleaning a tiled surface with a purple bucket nearby. (4) A scene shows the 'Super Absorbent' head soaking up a large puddle of water on a bathroom floor. (5) A woman in a grey hoodie joins the man; they both hold mop heads and talk directly to the camera. (6) The man concludes by dancing and waving a white mop head while promotional graphics and a colorful suitcase/helmet appear on screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins immediately. A male voice speaks in a high-pitched, energetic, and rapid-fire tone in Mandarin and Taiwanese. (2) Occasional 'ding' and 'pop' sound effects punctuate the transitions between product features. (3) The music remains consistent in tempo as a female voice joins, speaking in a friendly and informative tone during the middle segment. (4) Ambient noise is minimal, suggesting a controlled indoor environment or studio-quality recording. (5) The video ends with the male voice shouting enthusiastically over the peaking volume of the BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '沒有錯 上班很累' (True, working is tiring) appears as a hook. (2) Decorative Text: '\好神拖 x hahababy/' branding appears in a stylized font. (3) Functional Text: '極細緻布盤' (Extremely fine cloth disk), '抗油污布盤' (Oil-resistant cloth disk), and '超吸水布盤' (Super absorbent cloth disk) identify product types. (4) Decorative Text: '不容易刮傷' (Not easy to scratch) and '適合廚房加強清潔' (Suitable for kitchen deep cleaning) highlight benefits. (5) Promotional Text: 'momo獨家優惠', '買布盤抽行李箱/安全帽!!!' (Buy cloth disks to win a suitcase/helmet) serves as the final call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Product Feature Comparison -> Maintenance Tips -> Promotional Offer

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator (蔡阿嘎) and 1 female collaborator (二伯) appearing throughout.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The male character wears a white oversized t-shirt and vertical-striped beige pants. The female character wears a grey zip-up hoodie.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern home interior featuring light wood cabinetry, white walls, and various floor types including light wood, tile, and stone.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature 1 -> Feature 2 -> Feature 3 -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional endorsement for 'Supamop' replacement heads. It uses a high-energy vlog style to educate viewers on the specific uses of different mop head materials (fine fabric, oil-resistant, and absorbent) and emphasizes the importance of regular replacement to maintain cleanliness, ultimately driving traffic to a specific e-commerce platform (momo) for a limited-time offer.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct demonstration of the product, display of brand packaging, and clear mention of a shopping platform discount (momo).

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed narration style and 'hahababy' branding associated with the influencer 蔡阿嘎.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The fast editing and beat-synced SFX are designed for high engagement on short-form video platforms like Instagram Reels or TikTok.
